_note: Customer-facing 'What's new' feed shown on the login screen + admin Overview. Newest release FIRST. Keep items short, plain-language, benefit-led (no internal table/tool names). Bump VERSION file when you cut a release and add a block here.

releases.title: Faster answers for reworded repeat questions
items: The assistant now recognises a question it has answered before even when it's worded differently, and replies instantly with fresh numbers — not just on exact repeats.

releases.title: Smarter query reuse + self-correction
items: The assistant now consistently draws on similar queries it has answered before, so repeat and lookalike questions are quicker and more reliable.
When you mark an answer as wrong with a correction, the assistant automatically stops reusing that learned query.
Learned queries that prove out are now folded into the assistant's training each time it retrains.

releases.title: The assistant reuses what it has learned — faster repeat answers
items: Repeat data questions can now be answered in a fraction of a second by re-running a previously-learned query against today's numbers — no waiting for the assistant to think it through again.
The assistant can recall queries it wrote for similar past questions and adapt them, so it answers more reliably.
New admin Query Bank screen (Usage & Cost) to review what the assistant has learned, approve or reject each learned query, and see how often questions repeat.

releases.title: The assistant now learns from real questions
items: When the assistant answers a data question, it now quietly remembers the question and the query it used — building a private library of what your team actually asks. No change to answers yet; this is the groundwork that will let it reply faster to repeat questions over time.

releases.title: Friendly robot assistant on the chat widget
items: The chat widget button now shows our little assistant robot instead of a plain chat bubble — it gently bobs, blinks, and waves so visitors know help is one tap away.
Your uploaded logo still takes over the button when you've set one.

releases.title: Training log now shows full date & time + history
items: Every line in the training log now carries the real date and time, and the view always stays pinned to the newest line.
New History tab in the training panel groups past training activity by day and by run, so you can scroll back through everything the assistant has learned.
Fresh installs now start completely clean — no sample data is loaded automatically (you can still load demo data on demand).

releases.title: Tune the system live from the admin console
items: Super admins can now adjust operational settings — answer caching, response speed, automatic retraining, catalog enrichment, and activity logging — from the admin console, with changes taking effect in seconds and no restart.
The chat concurrency limit is now adjustable on the fly, so you can scale how many questions the assistant answers in parallel as your store count grows.

releases.title: Production-readiness hardening
items: Dashboard access is now enforced on the server as well, closing the last gap where a restricted role could still reach dashboard data by typing the address.
Creating an admin account is now reserved for the super admin — regular admins can add users but cannot grant admin rights.
Optional hands-off mode: when turned on, the system can automatically refresh its training the moment your data changes (off by default).

releases.title: Access limits are now enforced, not just hidden
items: Surfaces a role can't see are now blocked on the server too — not only hidden from the menu — so restricted users can't reach data-management screens by typing the address.

releases.title: Finer control over who sees what
items: Access control now covers seven areas — Dashboard, Chat, Workspace, Integrations, Admin Console, Users & Access and Usage & Cost — each toggled per role.
New default: admins see everything except the Admin Console (governance), while regular users get Dashboard and Chat only. Super admins stay full and can change any of it.

releases.title: Control who sees what
items: Super admins can now decide which roles reach the Admin Console, dashboards and chat — set once in Admin Settings, enforced everywhere.
By default admins see the full console while regular users get just dashboards and chat; the super admin can change this any time.

releases.title: Stop re-training built-in tables
items: The system no longer tries to repeatedly train its own internal lookup tables, so it stays idle when there is genuinely nothing new to learn.

releases.title: No busywork on unchanged data
items: Re-uploading the same data, or a routine check with nothing changed, no longer starts a training run — it only trains when data actually changes or a table is new.

releases.title: The agent watches over your data
items: A background helper now keeps an eye on your data and only does work when something actually changes — quiet times cost nothing.
More reliable data imports: large spreadsheets load in full, column names stay intact, and re-uploads no longer fail.
See what the helper has been doing in the robot panel's new Watching tab.

releases.title: What's new, right on the version
items: Click the version on the sign-in screen to see what changed in the latest release.
Cleaner sign-in page — the old What's-new banner is gone.

releases.title: Widgets follow your Brand instantly
items: Set a theme once on the Brand page and every store widget updates live — colour, position and greeting, no re-deploy.
Widgets only keep their own look when you deliberately override a single store.
Fixed widgets showing the old navy default instead of your brand colour.

releases.title: Smarter stock answers
items: Catalog and stock no longer need to match 100% — the assistant now tells you 'in catalog, 0 on hand' vs 'we don't carry it'.
Clear 'Not Found' when an item exists in neither catalog nor stock.
Data-quality screen flags catalog gaps and orphan stock so you can fix the source files.

releases.title: Faster counter answers
items: Plain availability questions ('is X in stock?') answer in ~2s with no AI round-trip.
Richer analyst answer card — compact KPI tiles, show-SQL, evidence freshness.
Repeated questions served from a curated answer cache.

releases.title: Embed widgets + training visibility
items: Per-outlet embeddable chat widgets with one-click deploy zips.
Live training pipeline view on the dashboard.
Burmese + English replies that mirror the question language.
